Nico Ward About

About me

I'm Nico, an engineer and designer based in London, UK. I'm the founder of Atelier, an AI studio building liquid software for high-performance teams.

Previously, I led the personalisation team at Healf, a £100M+ company building the future of wellbeing intelligence. I also spent time building early Gen AI tools at Sapient AI Labs, and personalised learning interfaces at Educai.

I write about software, design, and (occasionally) personal growth. My posts tend to be short and infrequent.

Page design

This site follows Steph Ango's file over app philosophy. It is built with a custom Python static site generator and uses the Flexoki color scheme — an inky palette inspired by analog printing. The design prioritises readability and simplicity.

Pro tips: press T to toggle the theme between light and dark, S to open search, or H to jump home.

Contact

Say hello: email or linkedin

Vibe-coded with love in London, UK.
